---
title: "FGCZ Quarto reports authoring guide"
---

[View the source skill file on GitHub](https://github.com/prolfqua/fgczquartotemplate/blob/main/skills/fgcz-quarto-reports/SKILL.md).

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
skill <- readLines(
  "../skills/fgcz-quarto-reports/SKILL.md",
  warn = FALSE
)
frontmatter <- which(skill == "---")
stopifnot(length(frontmatter) >= 2L)
body <- skill[-seq_len(frontmatter[[2]])]
title_line <- grep("^# ", body)[[1]]
cat(body[-title_line], sep = "\n")
```
